title: Simple Coins
description: A mod that introduces a fully functional, expandable currency system, ideal for modpacks and multiplayer servers.
body:
# 🪙 Simple Coins
Simple Coins is a lightweight mod that introduces a fully functional, expandable currency system, ideal for modpacks and multiplayer servers.

## 💰 Features
### 🪙 Five tiers of coins, each crafted from a different vanilla material:

Tier 1 – Copper

Tier 2 – Iron

Tier 3 – Gold

Tier 4 – Diamond

Tier 5 – Netherite

### ⚒️ Coin Press: A special crafting item required to mint new coins.

Crafted with 4 Diamonds, 2 Iron Blocks, 2 Iron Ingots and a Lava Bucket

![Coin Press crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/417cd1c660cd885127db5ecd0875d36e197072be.png)

Requires 8 of a material (e.g., Copper Ingots) and 1 durability to press 1 coin

![Coin crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1393d408fdf303d9d293f1225ff1454f64dcd62d.png)

64 durability total

### 🧱 Crafting Progression:

5 Coins → 1 Stack of Coins

5 Stacks → 1 Handful of Coins

2 Stacks → 1 Coin of the Next Tier

### ✨ Fresh custom textures for every coin and bundle, designed to fit seamlessly into Minecraft’s art style

## 🔧 Use Cases
🛒 Server economies or marketplaces

🎮 Adventure/RPG modpacks needing item-based currency

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Player-run shops and trading systems

🪙 A fun collectible or loot system for maps and mods

## 📦 Lightweight & Compatible
-No world generation or complex systems

-Easy to integrate into any modpack

-Fully self-contained with no dependencies
